Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <xs:schema version="1.0" targetNamespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/constellation/v1" xmlns:tns="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/constellation/v1" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="dailyHoroscope" type="tns:dailyHoroscope"/> <xs:element name="dailyHoroscopeResponse" type="tns:dailyHoroscopeResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="dailyHoroscope"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="presentDay" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="dailyHoroscopeResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Status" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>
